title: TATA IPL 2025 HLs RCB v DC
desc: RCB chased 163 to beat DC by 6 wickets in Delhi. Krunal Pandya starred with 73* off 47 and 1/28. Kohli added 51 as RCB recovered from 26/3 to win with 9 balls to spare.
